Type Property# screensDidWake

macOS 26.0+

```
static var screensDidWake: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSWorkspace.ScreensDidWakeMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSWorkspace.ScreensDidWakeMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/Foundation/NotificationCenter/MessageIdentifier/screensDidWake#see-also)
